calendar.matters:
Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cyril A. Hackett and Mad Dog in the Fog.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Ginger Sopelo, Esq. appeared for plaintiff MC Lakeshore 1824, LLC.
Brooks Baskin, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Cyril A. Hackett was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mad Dog in the Fog.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed on January 14, 2020, and was personally served on defendant Cyril A. Hackett on January 23, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on January 15, 2020, and was effectuated on January 25, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on February 5, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 5, 2020.
Judgment for Possession only of the premises located at 530 Haight Street, San Francisco, CA was entered February 5, 2020.

Plaintiff MC Lakeshore 1824, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Commercial Lease Agreement.................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Adendum to Commercial Lease Agreement 07/06/95.............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Assignment of Lease dated 3/7/02...........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Assignment of Lease dated 7/7/04...........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Second Assignment of Lease dated 6/15/15...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 6: Notice to Pay Rent or Quit.................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 7: Proof of Service of Notice to Pay Rent or Quit.............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff MC Lakeshore 1824, LLC, and against the default defendants Cyril A. Hackett and Mad Dog in the Fog as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $33,381.87.
Holdover Damages - $24,621.70.
Attorney Fees - $4,233.50.
Costs - $1,723.34.

Total - $63,960.41.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
